metadata.description: Science-centered R package development skills. The r-science workflow spine (whiteboard -> plan -> tests -> implement -> verify -> benchmark/optimise -> review, correctness-first and functional by default), depending on the upstream Posit skills for general-purpose R, GitHub, and publishing workflows.

plugins.name: r-science
plugins.description: Science-centered R package development. The r-science workflow spine (whiteboard -> plan -> tests -> implement -> verify -> benchmark/optimise -> review, correctness-first and functional by default) plus R OOP and Bayesian skills. Depends on the upstream Posit plugins for general developer, GitHub, r-lib, and publishing skills.
